name: Prime Finance
description_short: Wisconsin's first credit union (founded 1923) serving Milwaukee, Brown Deer, and Cudahy with member-owned banking, loans, and community development focus.
description_long:
Prime Financial Credit Union was founded in 1923 by Milwaukee city employees as the first state-chartered credit union in Wisconsin. The institution emerged from Senator Herman Schultz's vision to protect workers from predatory lending practices, inspired by cooperative banking models he observed in Germany. Over a century later, Prime Financial has maintained its mission-driven approach while modernizing its services for contemporary members.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans with fast preapproval, mortgage services with personalized consultations, personal loans, credit cards (Prime Platinum Visa with rewards points), motorcycle loans, and flexible payment plans (FlexPay). Members can access online banking, loan applications, payment services, and financial planning tools. The organization also provides credit-building solutions and educational resources to help members improve their financial health.

Prime Financial distinguishes itself through its Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI) designation and explicit commitment to underserved populations, particularly Hispanic and migrant communities through their "Juntos Avanzamos" program. As a not-for-profit member-owned institution, the credit union reinvests earnings back into the community rather than distributing profits to shareholders. Their nearly 100-year history as Wisconsin's pioneering credit union reflects institutional stability and deep community roots.

The organization is best suited for residents in their service areas (Milwaukee, Brown Deer, Cudahy, Wisconsin) seeking member-owned banking with community-focused values. The main limitation is geographic restriction—membership and services are limited to specific Wisconsin locations and potentially field-of-membership requirements typical of credit unions.
pros: First-ever state-chartered credit union in Wisconsin (founded 1923) with nearly 100 years of institutional stability
Certified Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI) with explicit focus on underserved and Hispanic/migrant communities
Comprehensive product suite including auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, credit cards, and motorcycle loans
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure means earnings reinvested in community rather than shareholder profits
FlexPay Plans allow breaking debit card purchases into smaller payments for budget flexibility
Offers credit-building solutions and financial education aligned with community development mission
cons: Geographic service limitation to Milwaukee, Brown Deer, and Cudahy, Wisconsin only
May have field-of-membership restrictions typical of credit unions limiting who can join
Website does not display specific APR rates, loan terms, or fee schedules for comparison shopping
Limited information about online banking capabilities and whether full digital account opening is available
No mention of mobile app availability or mobile banking features
best_for: Milwaukee-area residents seeking member-owned banking with community development values
Hispanic and migrant workers in Wisconsin looking for culturally-responsive financial services
Credit union members wanting to support local, mission-driven institutions
Individuals building or rebuilding credit in the greater Milwaukee area
diagnosis: Prime Financial Credit Union is best for residents in Milwaukee, Brown Deer, or Cudahy, Wisconsin who qualify for membership and seek full-service banking from a mission-driven, member-owned institution with deep community roots. The main caveat is that membership may be restricted by field-of-membership requirements and geographic service area, and specific rates and terms must be obtained directly from the organization rather than disclosed on the public website.
services: Prime Platinum Visa credit card with rewards points
FlexPay Plans (flexible payment plans for debit card purchases)
Credit building and credit improvement solutions
Financial planning and payment estimation tools
meta_title: Prime Financial — Credit Union in Cudahy, WI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Prime Financial — NCUA-insured credit union in Cudahy, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
